zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Pêche於1332年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Gilbert de Pêche IV28歲，母親Joan de Weyland33歲。他於1355年與Eleanor在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1376年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾咸頓 在 阿爾登享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲咸頓 在 阿爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Pêche于1332年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Gilbert de Pêche IV28岁，母亲Joan de Weyland33岁。他于1355年与Eleanor在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1376年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾咸頓 在 阿爾登享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 米德藍茲咸頓 在 阿爾登。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pêche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Pêche was born in 1332, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert de Pêche IV, was 28 and his mother, Joan de Weyland, was 33. He married Eleanor in 1355, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1376, in Hampton in Arden, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Hampton in Arden, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Pêche est né en 1332, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert de Pêche IV, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan de Weyland, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor en 1355, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1376, à Hampton in Arden, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Hampton in Arden, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Hampton in Arden, Warwickshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 함프턴 인 아든
ko.St. Mary and St. Bartholomew Churchyard,: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 함프턴 인 아든
ko.lifeSummary: John de Pêche(이)가 1332년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Pêche IV(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Weyland(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Eleanor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 함프턴 인 아든에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 함프턴 인 아든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Pêche nasceu em 1332, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert de Pêche IV, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Weyland, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor em 1355, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.Hampton in Arden, Warwickshire, England: хамптон ин арден, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.St. Mary and St. Bartholomew Churchyard,: хамптон ин арден, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Pêche родился в 1332 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Pêche IV было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Weyland, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor в 1355 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1376 г. в местности хамптон ин арден, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности хамптон ин арден, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания.
